summary: Good show in scorching heat with solid performance; recording quality not detailed
review: The reviewer rates the concert 4 stars, noting a scorching‑hot atmosphere and calling it a good show especially after an even more intense night in Austin. No specific comments about the audio source or sound quality are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it is positive (4 ★) and praises the performance; no recording details to adjust rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type were made by reviewers.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer felt the show was solid despite hot conditions and compared it favorably to the previous night in Austin.
